mapper.sql: id, workflow_def_id, task_name, priority, status, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at, warehouse_id, biz_type, start_point, end_point, task_direction, task_number, vehicle_id, task_type, task_phase, process_instance_id, is_auto_start, device_ids, location, depth, front_empty, work_direction, wms_biz_id, order_no, aisle_no, process_definition_id, task_category, twins_no

choose.when: select from tasks WITH (NOLOCK)

INSERT INTO tasks (workflow_def_id, task_name, priority, started_at, completed_at, warehouse_id, biz_type, start_point, end_point, task_direction, task_number, vehicle_id, task_type, task_phase, process_instance_id, is_auto_start, location, depth, front_empty, work_direction, wms_biz_id, order_no, aisle_no, device_ids, process_definition_id, twins_no, task_category) OUTPUT INSERTED.id values
(#{item.workflowDefId}, #{item.taskName}, #{item.priority}, #{item.startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.completedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.bizType}, #{item.startPoint}, #{item.endPoint}, #{item.taskDirection}, #{item.taskNumber}, #{item.vehicleId}, #{item.taskType}, #{item.taskPhase}, #{item.processInstanceId}, #{item.isAutoStart}, #{item.location}, #{item.depth}, #{item.frontEmpty}, #{item.workDirection}, #{item.wmsBizId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.aisleNo}, #{item.deviceIds}, #{item.processDefinitionId}, #{item.twinsNo}, #{item.taskCategory})

INSERT INTO tasks (workflow_def_id, task_name, priority, started_at, completed_at, warehouse_id, biz_type, start_point, end_point, task_direction, task_number, vehicle_id, task_type, task_phase, process_instance_id, is_auto_start, location, depth, front_empty, work_direction, wms_biz_id, order_no, aisle_no, device_ids, process_definition_id, twins_no, task_category) values
(#{item.workflowDefId}, #{item.taskName}, #{item.priority}, #{item.startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.completedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.bizType}, #{item.startPoint}, #{item.endPoint}, #{item.taskDirection}, #{item.taskNumber}, #{item.vehicleId}, #{item.taskType}, #{item.taskPhase}, #{item.processInstanceId}, #{item.isAutoStart}, #{item.location}, #{item.depth}, #{item.frontEmpty}, #{item.workDirection}, #{item.wmsBizId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.aisleNo}, #{item.deviceIds}, #{item.processDefinitionId}, #{item.twinsNo}, #{item.taskCategory})
RETURNING id

SELECT sum(case when status = 'completed' and task_type = 'xsck' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) todayLoaded, sum(case when status = 'executing' and task_type = 'xsck' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) todayToLoad, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'executing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) realTimeTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' and process_instance_id is null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) queuedTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' and process_instance_id is null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) pendingTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'suspended' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) abnormalTasks FROM tasks WHERE warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId}

SELECT sum(case when status = 'completed' and task_type = 'xsck' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "todayLoaded", sum(case when status = 'executing' and task_type = 'xsck' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "todayToLoad", SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'executing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as realTimeTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' and process_instance_id is null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "queuedTasks", SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' and process_instance_id is null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "pendingTasks", SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'suspended' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "abnormalTasks" FROM tasks WHERE warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId}
SELECT ${groupByStr} as date, COUNT(*) as taskCount FROM tasks WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND created_at <= #{end} and warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} GROUP BY ${groupByStr}
SELECT ${groupByStr} as "date", COUNT(*) as "taskCount" FROM tasks WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND created_at <= #{end} and warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} GROUP BY ${groupByStr}

UPDATE tasks SET front_empty = #{frontEmpty}, updated_at = GETDATE() WHERE twins_no = #{twinsNo} AND depth = 'BACK' AND status IN ('pending', 'suspended') AND (front_empty IS NULL OR front_empty != #{frontEmpty})

UPDATE tasks SET front_empty = #{frontEmpty}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE twins_no = #{twinsNo} AND depth = 'BACK' AND status IN ('pending', 'suspended') AND (front_empty IS NULL OR front_empty != #{frontEmpty})

SELECT end_point as endPoint, COUNT(*) as taskCount, MIN(created_at) as earliestTime, MAX(priority) as highestPriority, SUM(CASE WHEN depth = 'SINGLE' OR depth = 'FRONT' THEN 1 WHEN depth = 'BACK' AND front_empty=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as easyCount, warehouse_id as warehouseId FROM tasks WHERE status = 'pending' AND is_auto_start = 1 AND end_point IS NOT NULL AND end_point != '' AND warehouse_id IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(#{warehouseIds}, ',')) GROUP BY end_point,warehouse_id

SELECT end_point as "endPoint", COUNT(*)::int as "taskCount", MIN(created_at) as "earliestTime", MAX(priority) as "highestPriority", SUM(CASE WHEN depth = 'SINGLE' OR depth = 'FRONT' THEN 1 WHEN depth = 'BACK' AND front_empty=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int as "easyCount", warehouse_id as "warehouseId" FROM tasks WHERE status = 'pending' AND is_auto_start = 1 AND end_point IS NOT NULL AND end_point != '' AND warehouse_id = ANY (string_to_array(#{warehouseIds}, ',')::int[]) GROUP BY end_point,warehouse_id
SELECT TOP 1 created_at FROM tasks WHERE status = 'pending' AND is_auto_start = 1 AND end_point = #{endPoint} and warehouse_id =#{warehouseId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT created_at FROM tasks WHERE status = 'pending' AND is_auto_start = 1 AND end_point = #{endPoint} and warehouse_id =#{warehouseId} ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1

select
from tasks WITH (NOLOCK) where id = #{id} and warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId}

select
from tasks where id = #{id} and warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId}

mapper.select: select device_ids from tasks where id = #{id}

choose.when: SELECT end_point as endPoint, COUNT(*) as taskCount, MIN(created_at) as earliestTime, MAX(priority) as highestPriority, SUM(CASE WHEN depth = 'SINGLE' OR depth = 'FRONT' THEN 1 WHEN depth = 'BACK' AND front_empty=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as easyCount, warehouse_id as warehouseId FROM tasks WHERE status = 'pending' AND is_auto_start = 1 AND end_point = #{endPoint} AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} GROUP BY end_point, warehouse_id

SELECT end_point as "endPoint", COUNT(*)::int as "taskCount", MIN(created_at) as "earliestTime", MAX(priority) as "highestPriority", SUM(CASE WHEN depth = 'SINGLE' OR depth = 'FRONT' THEN 1 WHEN depth = 'BACK' AND front_empty=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int as "easyCount", warehouse_id as "warehouseId" FROM tasks WHERE status = 'pending' AND is_auto_start = 1 AND end_point = #{endPoint} AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} GROUP BY end_point, warehouse_id

select TOP 1
from tasks where process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId}

select TOP 1
from tasks where task_category = #{taskCategory} AND wms_biz_id = #{wmsBizId} AND task_number = #{taskNumber}

select
from tasks where task_category = #{taskCategory} AND wms_biz_id = #{wmsBizId} AND task_number = #{taskNumber} limit 1

SELECT DISTINCT t.end_point FROM tasks t WITH (READPAST) WHERE t.status = 'pending' AND t.is_auto_start = 1 AND t.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND t.end_point IS NOT NULL AND t.end_point != '' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(t.device_ids, ',') s WHERE s.value = #{deviceId} )

SELECT DISTINCT t.end_point FROM tasks t WHERE t.status = 'pending' AND t.is_auto_start = 1 AND t.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND t.end_point IS NOT NULL AND t.end_point != '' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM unnest(string_to_array(t.device_ids, ',')) s(value) WHERE s.value = #{deviceId} )
